title: Lay personnel
summary: 9084 — magistrates, juries, selection, and role in the justice system.
learningObjectives: Explain role and powers of lay magistrates.
Outline jury selection, qualification, and discharge.
Analyse advantages and disadvantages of lay participation.

simpleExplanation.title: Ordinary citizens in court
simpleExplanation.summary: Magistrates decide most criminal cases; juries determine guilt in Crown Court — both embed community judgment but face bias and consistency concerns.

sections.content: **Lay personnel** (1.3.3) completes Paper 1. Balance **democratic participation vs expertise**.
